title: Drones over Europe raise concerns about Russian activities
summary_full: A new study, backed up by analysts and political leaders, says frequent drone flights over NATO military assets mark a Russian campaign to probe defenses and gather information.
summary_public: A new study, backed up by analysts and political leaders, says frequent drone flights over NATO military assets mark a Russian campaign to probe defenses and gather information.

RU.label: negative
RU.evidence: Russian campaign to probe defenses and gather information
